Interface Mineable

All Known Implementing Classes:
baseStone, HardStone, Iron, Mithril, NormalStone, Platinum, Vibranium
public interface Mineable
Represents a stone or resource node that can be mined by the player.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getDurability()
    Returns the current durability of this node.
    int
    getMaxDurability()
    Returns the maximum durability of this node.
    boolean
    isBroken()
    Returns whether this node is fully depleted and can no longer be mined.
    List<BaseItem>
    mine(int minePower, Player player)
    Mines this node with the given power level and grants items to the player.

  • Method Details

    • mine

      List<BaseItem> mine(int minePower, Player player)
      Mines this node with the given power level and grants items to the player.
      Parameters:
      minePower - the mining power of the player's pickaxe
      player - the player performing the mining action
      Returns:
      the list of items obtained from mining

    • isBroken

      boolean isBroken()
      Returns whether this node is fully depleted and can no longer be mined.
      Returns:
      true if broken, false otherwise

    • getDurability

      int getDurability()
      Returns the current durability of this node.
      Returns:
      current durability

    • getMaxDurability

      int getMaxDurability()
      Returns the maximum durability of this node.
      Returns:
      maximum durability
